# 4loops Technologies

> Ethiopian software company delivering AI systems, ERP & CRM solutions, cloud infrastructure, and custom software for businesses across East Africa since 2019.

## Company Overview

4loops Technologies is a software engineering company headquartered in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. Founded in 2019, we specialize in building AI-powered software, enterprise systems, cloud infrastructure, and custom software solutions for businesses across Ethiopia and East Africa.

We serve clients in industries including financial services, healthcare, education, e-commerce, construction, logistics, food and beverage, and government.

## Core Services

- Custom Software Development: Bespoke web, desktop, and mobile applications built with Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, Go, PostgreSQL, and other modern technologies.
- AI & Machine Learning: Intelligent automation, NLP (including Amharic and Afaan Oromoo), computer vision, predictive analytics, and conversational AI systems.
- Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps: End-to-end cloud architecture on AWS, Azure, and GCP with CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, and GitOps workflows.
- ERP & CRM Systems: Enterprise resource planning and CRM implementation using Odoo, ERPNext, and custom-built solutions tailored to Ethiopian business requirements.
- Mobile App Development: Cross-platform iOS and Android applications using Flutter and React Native with offline-first architecture.
- Cybersecurity & Compliance: Penetration testing, security audits, ISO 27001 compliance, zero-trust architecture, and 24/7 threat monitoring.
- Business Intelligence & Analytics: Custom dashboards, data warehousing, ETL pipelines, and predictive reporting.
- Digital Transformation: End-to-end digital strategy, process automation, change management, and technology consulting.

## Products

- AI Assistant Pro: Context-aware conversational AI platform with multi-language support including Amharic. Enterprise-grade security, custom model training, and integrations with CRM, ERP, and helpdesk systems.
- Analytics Hub: Real-time business intelligence platform with predictive analytics, custom dashboards, automated ETL pipelines, and 50+ data source connectors.
- DocuFlow: AI-powered document management system with smart OCR (99%+ accuracy), workflow automation, e-signatures, and support for Amharic and Geez scripts.
- CommUnify: Unified team communication platform combining chat, HD video conferencing for up to 500 participants, file sharing, and 200+ app integrations.
- TapConnect NFC: NFC-powered digital business card platform with real-time profile updates, engagement analytics, QR code fallback, and team management dashboard.

## Technology Stack

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Python, Go, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Terraform, Flutter, React Native, Firebase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, Azure, GCP.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Headquarters: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
- Team Size: 10-50 employees
- Projects Delivered: 50+
- Client Satisfaction: 98%
- Area Served: Ethiopia, East Africa, and globally
- Languages Supported: English, Amharic
- Contact Email: hello@4loopstechnologies.com
- Website: https://4loopstechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/4loops-technologies

## Featured Projects

- Buna Bello: Full-stack e-commerce platform for a premium Ethiopian coffee brand with inventory management and order fulfillment.
- Temari Lije: EdTech platform connecting students with tutors featuring AI-powered learning recommendations.
- Neo Vend: Smart vending management system with IoT telemetry, cashless payments, and route optimization.
- Zekre Sematat: Brand identity and digital presence with website, ticketing platform, and social media integration.
- Saylem Construction: Project management platform with site tracking, material procurement, and workforce scheduling.

## Differentiators

- Local-first AI: Models trained on local languages and business contexts, not just machine translation.
- Offline-first architecture: Applications designed for markets with variable connectivity.
- Deep domain expertise: Deep understanding of Ethiopian regulatory requirements, tax codes, and business practices.
- End-to-end delivery: From discovery workshops through deployment and ongoing support.
- Enterprise security: SOC 2 compliant, end-to-end encryption, data residency controls.
